items.claim: Cesar was dropped by Abdul Razak Alhassan.
items.quote: Caesar got dropped by Abdul Razaka.

items.claim: Cesario Lechek controlled Cesar for 11 minutes.
items.quote: Cesario Lech controlled him for what, 11 minutes, bro.

items.claim: Cesar was outgrappled by Roman Kapulov.
items.quote: Cesar made got controlled by Roman Kapulov. Like he was getting outgrappled by Roman Kapulof.

items.claim: Penis has only been to the second round twice in his career.
items.quote: Penis has been to round two twice in his career.

items.claim: Cesar has gone the distance with Alex three times.
items.quote: Caesar went the distance with Alex three times.

items.claim: Zachary Reese is very good at facing adversity and has good recovery.
items.quote: I will say with Zachary, he's very good at facing adversity. Very good recovery as well.

items.claim: Jackson McVey gave Zachary Reese a lot of issues in their fight.
items.quote: Jackson McVey was giving a lot of issues to Zach Reese.
